Book an Appointment

About Us

At Expert Cosmetics Solutions, we strive to provide our clients with the latest and most in-demand skin, body and non-surgical cosmetic treatments.

With our experience in the cosmetic and skin care industry, we are able to provide phenomenal services that are both; safe and effective. We aim to be the best cosmetic clinic in Melbourne by specialising in non-surgical treatments that help our clients get naturally beautiful looking skin. We also create personalised treatment plans for our clients based on their skin needs and issues after completing a thorough skin analysis.

We believe in keeping our clients informed about the entire process and guiding them through skin or body care treatments before they make any decision. Our long-term treatments and medical cosmetics services are designed to generate lasting results. Our well-trained staff examines your medical history and then suggests the best treatment for you. We offer a variety of cosmetic skin care solutions, from cosmetic injectables to micro-needling and much more.

We offer a combination of natural remedies combined with advancements in skin care, just like our micro-needling sessions where you can replenish the natural glow of your skin in a matter of a few sessions. Explore our page further, to better understand our services. You can always reach out to us if you have any queries and we’ll be happy to help you!

Booking a session at our Melbourne Cosmetic Clinic is pretty simple. All you need to do is contact us via text, call, Instagram or even our website and we’ll get back to you soon.

Why Expert Cosmetics?

Expert Cosmetic Solutions is the best choice when it comes to cosmetics clinics in Melbourne. With many years of experience in the industry, we have perfected our methods to deliver high-quality services. We only use products that are supplied by trustworthy, licensed pharmaceutical suppliers. We understand the importance of selecting the right products for skin care and beauty services and treatments. Cheap and unreliable products can cause great harm to the skin and damage it in the long run. This is why our clients trust us for using only licensed products with minimal to no side effects. Our founder, Aubrey has completed several courses in cosmetics, participated in training sessions held by the world’s top pharmaceuticals and has also completed thousands of non-surgical procedures throughout her career; including those on celebrities. With her expertise, we are able to operate as a successful, trustworthy and best cosmetic clinic in Melbourne that has the opportunity to help thousands of clients achieve their skin goals in a safe and effective way.

Book an Appointment

You Are Our #1 Priority

We want to make you feel and look your best without much hassle or pain.

Everyone’s skin is different.

The products that may work well for your friend’s skin may end up harming your skin. It is important to go through a verified and authentic skin-analysis process before choosing any skin care treatment for yourself. At Expert Cosmetics, we help you take control of the entire cosmetic and skin care treatment process by understanding your concerns and analysing your skin prior to recommending treatment. Your journey with us will always start with a personalised consultation in which we will work towards devising a tailored solution to your skin concerns that can be achieved within your budget. Whether you have tried skin or body care treatments in the past that have failed miserably at treating your issues or it is your first time at a cosmetic clinic in Melbourne, we are here to support you in repairing your skin from damage, replenishing its natural glow and achieving lasting results with our treatments.

Our affordable cosmetic treatment plans are prescribed as per your preference, concerns and lifestyle.

Your happiness matters the most to us and it is by claiming your trust that we want to become the best cosmetic clinic in Melbourne.

Book A Consultation With Us

You can always book a consultation with us by reaching out to us via our Instagram, through a phone call, text or even through our website.

Book an Appointment

Got Questions About Our Treatments?

Visit our FAQs section to get all the answers you need.

  • Facial wrinkles are created when muscles are contracting during facial expressions. When we are sad, happy, angry or surprised, our face contracts.  Excessive contractions result in more prominent, deep wrinkles.

    Other factors that may contribute facial wrinkles are lifestyle/smoking, exposure to UV rays, free radicals and dry skin.

    Anti wrinkle treatment also known as neuromodulators or wrinkle-relaxing injections is the most popular cosmetic treatment that allows softening of unwanted lines. Its action is to temporarily block the signals from the brain to the muscle, allowing the target muscle to stay relaxed for up to 4 months – gradually regaining strength as the product breaks down through normal metabolic activity.

    Anti-wrinkle treatment is most effective in treating frown lines, forehead lines and Crow’s feet.

    Also effective for:

    • Gummy smiles 

    • Facial slimming / excessive clenching 

    • Excessive underarm sweating / hyperhidrosis 

    • Eyebrow lift 

    • Smoker’s lines 

    • Dimpled chin 

    • Marionette lines 

    • Neck bands 

    • Anti-wrinkle injections have minimal to no down-time.

  • Cosmetic injectables are designed to postpone the aging process, NOT stop it. The normal ageing process will continue even with treatments. If you decide to stop getting treatments, your wrinkles will NOT get worse. It is not unusual, however, for people to think they have more lines than usual as they have been used to seeing a lot smoother and wrinkle-free skin while using treatments compared to when they don’t have treatments.

  • Is a term used for male clients getting wrinkle injections. For years, there has been a misconception that cosmetic injectables are only for women. Nowadays it is a widely accepted treatment for all genders. Male facial muscles are naturally thicker and stronger which means they will require a higher dosage.

  • Ageing is a continuous, normal process which can be aggravated by extrinsic factors including lifestyle, sun damage and environmental toxins. Dermal filler is a minimally invasive cosmetic procedure with the use of a very fine needle. The active ingredient used is Hyaluronic Acid, a naturally occurring (polysaccharide) substance in the body.

    HA dermal filler is a gel injection that is effective in restoring volume, adding youthful contours, smoothing and hydrating the skin. Most popularly used for lips and cheek augmentation, as well as defining jawline, reducing the appearance of wrinkles around the tear troughs, naso-labial folds, corners of the mouth and chin.

    Dermal fillers come in different consistencies, from soft and light to a more denser, thick type of gel, lasting from 6 to 18 months depending on the body’s metabolism. This treatment provides an instant rejuvenating result with almost no down-time.

  • Swelling is one of the common side effects of lip injections. This is only temporary. Some people term this initial swelling as “duck-lips”. This swelling can last up to 3 days. The worst point is usually during the second day. Medication such as anti-histamine may reduce the severity of the swelling. If swelling persists for more than 3 days and is accompanied with severe pain and discomfort, this should not be treated as normal and should be reported to your cosmetic professional for reassessment immediately.

  • Longevity of treatment is unique to each individual. Lifestyle, metabolic rate, age, medication, medical conditions and physical activities may affect the longevity of your treatment. On average, Anti-wrinkle injections can last up to 4 months while dermal fillers can last up to 9 months.

  • Minimal discomfort may be experienced during the treatment. When getting filler injections, local anaesthetic may be applied prior to treatment. Some other tools to relieve/minimise discomfort may be available such as ice packs, vibrating stick, music, stress balls etc. It is highly recommended to advise your injector if you have a history of previous fainting episodes when getting injections. The site of needles can be confronting to some patients, it is ideal to make sure you don’t come to your appointment on an empty stomach.

  • Some treatments, especially dermal filler injections, may require a local numbing agent prior to treatment. Anti-wrinkle treatments, however, do not require numbing.

  • This varies, depending what treatment is getting done. Anti-wrinkle injections usually take no longer than 15 mins to complete while dermal filler takes longer. It is important to allow your injector as much time as possible to not rush the procedure. Cosmetic injectables are medical procedures that need careful assessment, precision and professional handling.

  • Most non-surgical treatments require minimum downtime.

    Anti-wrinkle treatment : Zero

    Dermal Fillers : 24-48 hours

    Sub-mental fat dissolving : up to 10 day

  • There are various brands available in the market. The clinic guarantees to use only top-quality brands that have been tested worldwide to deliver safe and effective results. It is illegal in Australia to discuss product brands prior to seeing a professional; as patients have individual needs and we can only determine appropriate products suited for a patient upon thorough assessment. Appropriate product will be suggested during consultation.

  • Legally 18 years and above

  • Common side effects straight away after treatments include: Swelling, bruising, redness, lumps, slight tenderness and numbness from local anaesthetic. For dermal filler treatment, some of these side effects may worsen after 24 hours. You may get a slight headache from anti-wrinkle injections that can come and go after the treatment. This could last for a few days until full efficacy of the treatment is achieved. Temporary loss of muscle movement is normal around the area treated with anti-wrinkle medication. If you are experiencing uncommon symptoms or are in doubt contact the clinic immediately.

  • Very rare risks include:

    Ptosis or droopy eyelids after anti-wrinkle injections. This happens when the medication spreads to adjacent muscles that are not meant to be treated. A special eyedrop may be prescribed to help this issue. However generally relieves after 2-6 weeks.

    Necrosis or cell death around the area that was treated with dermal fillers. This happens when a blood vessel is being blocked resulting in very small or no oxygen supply to the tissue causing the cell to die. A special dissolving agent may be administered to prevent cell death. Early detection and a no-delaying approach is necessary to achieve a satisfying prognosis.

    Nerve damage is another risk reported with the use of dermal fillers. This happens when pressure from the filler or tissue swelling is placed on the nerves surrounding the area. An anti-histamine may be prescribed to minimise swelling and remove pressure from the affected nerve. Dissolving the filler can be an option too.

    Permanent blindness is the most dangerous risk associated with dermal fillers with about 100 cases reported worldwide. This happens following a blockage of one of the major arteries that supplies oxygenated blood directly to the eyes. Unfortunately, there is no medication available to reverse blindness when it occurs. Avoiding placing fillers to high risk areas is by far the most effective way of preventing blindness.

    Infection is also another dangerous risk following any procedure that deals with needles. This may spread to surrounding areas of the body if not treated straight away. A course of antibiotic and cortisone may be prescribed to stop the spread of bacteria-causing infection. Strict compliance of after care is a must.

  • Strict compliance of the after care; disclosure of medical issues and medications that may increase chances of developing the risks. Awareness of what to expect after treatment and reporting any unusual symptoms. Getting your treatments only from qualified professionals.

  • It is safe to get retreatment every 2-4 months however it is important to discuss this with your injector. A treatment plan to follow for appropriate dosing is also important.

  • You are generally safe to have anti-wrinkle treatment; unless you have the following: Myaesthenia Gravis, Eaton-Lambert Syndrome, Guillian Barre Syndrome, Amyothropic Lateral Sclerosis, Allergy to Botulinum toxin, allergy to albumin, allergy to normal saline, active infection to the area, pregnant and breastfeeding.

    You are generally safe to have dermal filler treatment unless you have the following: Active infection, allergy to Hyaluronic acid, allergy to gram positive bacteria proteins, allergy to lignocaine, allergy to bee sting, untreated epilepsy, porphyria, current treatment with Roaccutane, pregnant and breastfeeding. Discussing this with your scripting doctor and cosmetic injector if you are eligible for cosmetic treatments is important to minimise complications.

    When having dermal fillers you must not undergo another procedure or surgery including dental procedures in the 2 weeks pre and post treatment. This may increase the risk of infection.

    When having anti-wrinkle treatment, you must not recently have had a tetanus injection.

    Always discuss allergies with the injector. Consultation is always free.

  • Dermal filler shows results almost immediately after the treatment however swelling may also accompany results, at first. Anti-wrinkle can take up to 2 weeks to see noticeable difference.

  • Printed and detailed Pre/Post Care instructions are available at the clinic.

    Anti-Wrinkle:

    • Do not manipulate the treated area for 3 hours following treatment. Do not receive facial, laser treatment, facial threading, microdermabrasion for 10 days after treatment. 

    • Do not lie down for 4 hours after treatment. This will prevent the product from tracking into the orbit of your eyes and causing drooping of the eyelid. 

    • Can take up to 7 days for results to be seen. If the desired result is not seen after 2 weeks of your treatment, this may mean your muscle is stronger than expected and you may need additional treatment. Additional treatment incurs additional cost. 

    • Do not perform activities involving straining, heavy lifting, vigorous exercise or too much sun exposure for the first 24 hours. This will prevent the product from spreading causing ptosis. 

    • Avoid applying make-up straight away after injections, this may cause infection 

    Dermal Fillers:

    • Avoid significant movement or massaging the area treated unless instructed by the provider. 

    • Avoid strenuous exercise for 48 hours

    • Avoid extensive sun or heat for 72 hours 

    • Avoid consuming excessive amounts of alcohol or salts to avoid excess swelling 

    • If you have swelling,you may apply a cold compress for 15 mins each hour, take panadol for pain 

    • Try to sleep face up and slightly elevated if you experience swelling 

    • Take Arnica to help the bruising and swelling, starts at least 2 days prior to injections 

    • Take antiviral medication for 3 days if you have history of cold sore 

    • Avoid make-up for 24 hours

  • Yes absolutely, contact us to chat for free and discuss other treatments available.

  • Double Chin Treatment – A non-surgical fat dissolving procedure using deoxycholic acid injections, indicated for improvement of the appearance of moderate to severe sub-mental fat fullness or double chin. Deoxycholic Acid is a naturally occurring substance in the body that helps absorb fat. Minimum of 20 injections using very fine needles are required per treatment. This procedure may need up to 6 treatments to get a permanent result. Swelling is expected with this treatment which can last up to 10 days.

    Hair loss treatment – Using a device called DermaPen with growth factor peptide to help hair regeneration. This treatment will require a numbing agent beforehand to treat the sensitive area of the scalp. Will require religious follow up treatments at the start to achieve desired long lasting result.

    Other Non-Invasive Surgery – DermaFrac treatment is a 4-in-one facial treatment that focuses on skin rejuvenation and anti-ageing benefits. It is a unique combination therapy that gives you microdermabrasion, microneedling with infusion and LED light therapy all in ONE.

    The microdermabrasion treatment – uses vacuum that pulls the skin to an abrasive pad, this abrasive pad exfoliates the dry, dull skin while stimulating circulation and collagen production.

    The microneedling with infusion uses a dermal roller with very fine needles infused with potent serum to boost the result of the skin needling treatment. A variety of infusion includes HA serums, Anti Ageing serums, Lightening and Clarifying serums.

    The LED light therapy – will provide cool and comfortable treatment due to the CoolBreeze airflow. It will also help calm irritation and redness post treatment.

    The number of treatments – may vary from 6 to 12 months. This is great to include in your monthly skin maintenance in conjunction with cosmetic injectables. This unique combination of therapy requires zero down-time.

    Other skin treatments include:

    • Bridal facial packages

    • Pregnancy facial packages

    • Cleopatra 24ct gold facial packages

    • Advanced skin care products

  • Anytime there is any concern. Even when in doubt.

  • Normally: if you and a friend want to have treatment together, make sure to book two separate appointments one after the other. You can come in together. Please be aware that personal health questions will be asked during the consultation. Therefore, consultation may be done separately to ensure privacy.

    This is subject to change during Covid19 restrictions. Please contact the clinic for updated information. 

    My filler did not last as long as expected.

    Longevity may be affected by several factors, read previous question about “How long does cosmetic injectable treatments last”.

  • You can reschedule your appointment 24 hours prior by contacting us via phone or email. Your deposit will be carried out for use on the rescheduled date of appointment. If 24-hour notice is not given, your deposit will be forfeited.

  • Due to high demand, a deposit is required to secure your booking with Expert Cosmetic Solutions. This will be deducted from your final payment on completion.

  • Depending on bookings, you can have treatment if there are no bookings already in place. However, we cannot guarantee this as we may have a booking already in place after your consultation.

  • Make sure you contact us within 24hrs prior to your appointment so that we can refund your deposit.

  • Through our online booking system via our website, IG and FB account or by contacting us through call or text.

  • Photos are required for every treatment to compare results from before and after photos. This is to ensure we are providing adequate, satisfactory results. Your photos will be saved to a private file for which only your doctor and RN can access. You may be asked for your permission during or after your treatment for your photos to be published online or used for educational purposes, this will require an additional consent form to be signed and you may decline from this.

  • Cosmetic injectables fall under selective procedures and are not covered by Medicare. Speak to your GP if you have medical concerns and you will be referred to the appropriate health care professional.

  • Consent forms are used by medical practitioners to ensure you completely understand your treatment prior to going ahead. Important, detailed information is stated on your consent form; therefore it is very important to read thoroughly and understand before signing. You are required to provide private information to ensure we can provide you with appropriate care during the procedure and in cases of emergency. All information provided by you will remain private in accordance with the Privacy Act (1988), the Privacy Amendments (Enhancing Privacy Protection) Act 2012, the Australian Privacy Principles and relevant State and Territory privacy legislation. The information collected will remain private unless disclosure is required by law. If you have any concerns or complaints regarding your privacy, we ask you to please contact us via email.

  • You will be consulted by a scripting doctor and the treatment will be carried out by a qualified registered nurse.

  • Cost varies depending on what procedure is performed. Dermal fillers have different consistency and pricing varies according to the product thickness. Each patient is dosed differently, and price also varies depending on dosage. To get an idea of the pricing head to the price tab on our website. Pricing will also be discussed during consultation.

  • Paypal, Mastercard & Visa, ZipPay

  • Yes. Follow us on social media to see our latest promotions.

  • No.  

    Contact us to find out why. It’s important.

  • Cosmetic injectables are contraindicated to pregnant and breastfeeding women. We do have a pregnancy facial package that is safe for pregnant women.

Have questions? Get in touch today!
